emails.subject: Re: D-G Energy
emails.body: Re: D-G Energy Laine, I can initial it. Please, contact Beth Perlman as an IT officer. I shall explain the reason we are buying the software to her. I want the software to reside in our London office the software is used primarily by European utilities and we shall use it as a pricing tool in negotiations with European clients. Vince From: Laine Borgman@ENRON on 11/29/2000 09:29 AM
